title: Google releases Gemini 3.5 Live Translate for near real-time speech translation
friendlyTitle: Google released better live speech translation
summary: Google introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, an audio model for continuous speech-to-speech translation across more than 70 languages, rolling out through the Gemini Live API, AI Studio, Google Translate, and previews for Google Meet.
friendlySummary: Google introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate for continuous speech-to-speech translation in more than 70 languages.
whyItMatters: Better live translation can make meetings, travel, support calls, and education less dependent on shared language. For teams and service providers, the useful shift is from turn-by-turn translation toward smoother conversations.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can make meetings, travel, support calls, and classes easier when people speak different languages.
